title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 6–9, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AH?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What-

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Not here...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: BRATS! Where are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't think you can get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He's coming!!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: What...?!! I thought he was just a normal hypnotist....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If that's the case, I'll just have to...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Clear the whole damn forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What was that noise....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Well, that's probably just Jango losing his temper

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can see for yourself, but you will probably be too late...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We'd better hurry

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Can you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You two have stayed together for three years!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't you have any feelings for her?!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: As I've said before, Kaya is just a pawn in my plan

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And if she dies, I might actually thank her...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This guy's beyond saving!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I never thought of saving him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can't let you do whatever you want!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: must go and save them! Other- wise, they'll all be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's not a second to lose....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh, you can still move. Impressive

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Buchi!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
